creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
The problem should be fixed in ports c018fc438bceb2b0b72d458f24e2124912958fb0. py-rdflib 7.1.1 uses py-html5rdf, a fork of py-html5lib-modern, which no longer conflicts with py-html5lib. And it is optional (off by default) now.

IMHO, py-html5lib can be replaced with py-html5lib-modern.
